content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 TELUS Digital: Content Reviewer - United States Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Nevada All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2702/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Las Vegas, Nevada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence">https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence</a> </p> <p class="ql-align-justify">We are looking for an independent, flexible, remote opportunity where you can help improve AI-powered search technology from the comfort of your home? If you're curious, internet-savvy, and enjoy evaluating online content, this freelance project could be a great fit.</p> <p class="ql-align-justify"><strong>A Day in the Life of a Content Reviewer - US</strong></p> <p class="ql-align-justify">In this role, you will analyze and provide feedback on text, webpages, images, and other types of online content for leading search engines using a specialized online platform.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">By reviewing and rating search results for relevance and quality, you will help improve the overall search experience for millions of users around the world, including yourself.</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">Join our global community and put your skills to work supporting one of the world's leading search technologies.<br><br></p> <h4 class="sui-font-heading sui-text-h2 tw-font-bold sui-text-darkGray-darker tw-mb-1">Qualification path</h4> <p class="sui-text-b3 sui-text-darkGray-darker ql-editor">&nbsp;</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">No previous professional experience is required to apply for this opportunity.&nbsp;However, participation in this project requires meeting the basic requirements and successfully completing the qualification process.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p class="ql-align-justify"><strong>Basic Requirements</strong></p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Must have resided in the United States for the past three consecutive years</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Familiarity with current and historical business, media, sports, news, social media, and cultural affairs in the United States</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Active use of Gmail and social media platforms</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Experience using web browsers to navigate and interact with a variety of online content</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Daily access to a reliable broadband internet connection</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Access to a smartphone (Android 5.0 or higher, or iOS 14 or higher)</p> <p class="ql-align-justify">• Access to a personal computer<br><br></p> <p>JOIN TELUS NOW!</p> <div class="sui-flex sui-items-baseline sui-gap-2"><span class="sui-font-body tw-font-semibold tw-text-sm sm:tw-text-base md:tw-text-lg tw-py-3 sm:tw-py-4 tw-block tw-text-left">For Questions please reach out to:&nbsp;</span><a href="mailto:sourcingteam56@telusinternational.ai">sourcingteam56@telusinternational.ai</a></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-content-reviewer-united-states Coinbase: Product Marketing Manager, Prime & Markets Anywhere in the World Sales and Marketing Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - USA </p> <div class="content-intro"><p>Ready to do the most impactful work of your career? At&nbsp;<a href="https://www.coinbase.com/?utm_campaign=mt_o_m_w_m_m__coi_0_jd-onchain&amp;utm_source=coinbase">Coinbase</a>, we are uncompromising on our mission to increase economic freedom. The bar is high, the environment is intense, and we like it that way. This isn't a place for complacency, it’s a place to be pushed past your perceived limits. If you're ready to build the future of finance alongside people who refuse to settle for "good enough," you belong here. Coinbase is a remote-first, but not remote-only company. Expect to get together quarterly for intense in-person working sessions called “surges.”&nbsp;<a href="https://www.coinbase.com/careers">learn more about working at Coinbase</a>.</p></div><p>You'll join the Product Marketing team within the Institutional group and own how Coinbase's most complex institutional products show up to clients globally. You'll be the PMM behind spot, derivatives, cross-margin, liquidity, and execution workflows used by hundreds of hedge funds, asset managers, and market makers. Partnering closely with Product, Markets, Sales, Legal, and Comms, you'll translate deeply technical capabilities into clear positioning, sharp enablement, and GTM strategies that drive measurable client adoption.</p> <p><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own positioning and messaging for Prime and Markets across spot, futures, options, cross-margin, execution, and liquidity access, pressure-testing narratives with Sales, Product, Legal, and clients to ensure credibility at institutional scale.</li> <li>Lead GTM execution for major Prime and Markets launches, including product readiness, sales enablement, client communications, sequencing, and events.</li> <li>Build high-signal enablement materials - talk tracks, FAQs, battlecards, demos, and client-ready narratives - that reduce complexity for the field and reflect real objections, deals, and buying behavior.</li> <li>Partner with Sales, STPs, and Coverage to translate complex technical capabilities into institutional-grade clarity, and contribute market-backed insight that informs product roadmap conversations.</li> <li>Drive clarity around what's live, what's next, and what action clients should take across regions with varying regulatory constraints.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Required Skills and Experience:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years in product marketing, product strategy, or institutional GTM, with direct experience in institutional trading, derivatives (futures, options, margining, execution models), or market infrastructure.</li> <li>Proven track record building GTM strategies and positioning for technically complex products, with the ability to simplify systems like liquidity, capital efficiency, and market structure into clear, compelling narratives for sophisticated trading firms.</li> <li>Demonstrated success partnering cross-functionally with Product, Sales, Legal, and Comms to deliver launches and enablement that drive measurable client adoption.</li> <li>Fluency in the language of institutional markets -
